items.headline_en: LangGraph release feed now shows langgraph-prebuilt==1.0.12
items.summary_en: The monitored release feed for LangGraph changed and the newest visible tag is langgraph-prebuilt==1.0.12. The feed timestamp is 2026-04-27T17:14:44Z. This looks like a release-level update rather than a cosmetic page edit.
